name: Bandera Mexicana
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill six cocktail glasses with crushed ice.
2. With a melon baller, scoop six balls from the jicama. Place one jicama ball, one grape (or lime wedge), and one cherry on each skewer.
3. In a pitcher, combine sugar, lime juice, and tequila. Stir until well mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into the cocktail glasses.
5. Top each glass with a "Mexican flag" garnish.
